marketing.title: Your team's spending, under control.
marketing.subtitle: Log every expense, tag it by category, and check the month's total without opening a spreadsheet.
marketing.moduleRegistroDesc: Amount, category, description, and date. A straight form, no extra steps.
marketing.moduleCategoriasDesc: Travel, supplies, software, and other. Every entry stays organized to review later.
marketing.moduleEquipoTitle: One account for the whole team
marketing.moduleEquipoDesc: Expenses live in the team, not on someone's laptop. Invite your people with clear roles.
marketing.ctaSubtitle: Your team logs, Gastos adds it up. By month's end you already know where the money went.
marketing.alreadySignIn: Already have an account? Sign in

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Your team's spending, at a glance.
overview.emptyDesc: Log your team's first expense to see the overview here.

gastos.panelDesc: Log and review your team's expenses.
gastos.emptyDesc: Log your team's first expense with the form above.

insightMessages.spendSpike: Unusual spending on {day}: {total} vs a daily average of {avg}.
insightMessages.topCategoryShare: The {category} category holds {share}% of the last 30 days of spending — worth a review.

gastosAi.title: AI monthly summary
gastosAi.description: Generate a short AI summary of the last 30 days of expenses: totals, patterns and a saving tip.
gastosAi.noData: No expenses in the last 30 days to summarize.
